properties.scoped: Bounded by domain, risk threshold, and financial cap
properties.revocable: Any director can throttle autonomy to zero within seconds
properties.auditable: Every delegation creates a Flight Recorder entry

delegation_raw: Delegation is explicit (defined as CORE configuration), scoped (bounded by domain, risk threshold, and financial cap), revocable (any director can throttle autonomy in their domain to zero within seconds), and auditable (every delegation creates a Flight Recorder entry). CEO delegates operational execution up to $5M/transaction. CFO delegates routine financial operations up to $500K without escalation. Legal Director delegates compliance monitoring but requires escalation for any novel regulatory interpretation. All delegations are versioned and subject to quarterly review.
